stemHtml: The cruising levels at which a flight or a portion of a flight is to be conducted shall be in terms of…

options.a: flight levels, if the flight is at or above the lowest usable flight level.
options.b: flight levels, for flights in and above the transition layer.
options.c: heights, if the flight is below the transition altitude.
options.d: altitudes, if the flight is above the lowest usable flight level.
